query:
UPDATE `users` SET `dateOfBirth` = DATE_FORMAT(`dateOfBirth`, '%d/%m/%Y') WHERE `dateOfBirth` IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` MODIFY COLUMN `dateOfBirth` varchar(10);
